description: Run 1 baseline: Llama3 8B FSDP=4 TP=2 bs=1 8xH100; c4_test; construct_default_graph_passes returns empty list
Graph reconnaissance: counted FX node targets; 421 ag + 421 rs + 68 ar collectives; 196 detach; 842 _to_copy (recon-only, no perf attempt)
remove_detach_nodes pass: rewire and erase 196 aten.detach.default nodes (autograd-no-op under runtime no_grad); avg of 2 runs (4202, 4174); -2GiB memory
remove_redundant_to_copy: tested same-dtype/device elimination — 0 of 841 candidates qualified; all are real fp32->bf16 mixed-precision casts
bucket_all_gathers: shape-grouped, hoisted pure-op input chains; 421 AGs -> 64 buckets covering 160 AGs; 261 unbucketed singletons (shape heterogeneity); tps unchanged within noise
prefetch_all_gathers FX-level: only 65/421 movable, avg move 7 positions; make_fx already places AGs right after their input deps; tps unchanged
apply_inductor_pattern_passes: joint_graph_passes + post_grad_passes (is_inference=False); 11538 -> 9101 nodes (-21%); tps 4576/4569 avg 4572 (+9.9% vs baseline)
compile_fx_inductor (whole-graph codegen): compile_fx fails on in-place _c10d_functional.all_reduce_; compile_fx_inner fails with "_to_copy.default registered twice"; pass fell through to no-op

expanded apply_inductor_pattern_passes: added bucket_all_gather + bucket_reduce_scatter + stable_topological_sort + schedule_overlap_bucketing; tps 4781/4777/4793/4800 avg 4783 (+4.6% on iter 5, +14.9% on baseline)

install_cuda_graph: capture+replay gm.forward; uses traced_result.num_static_inputs to skip copy of stable FSDP param inputs (3 persistent buffers, not 295); destroy_process_group hook for clean shutdown; tps 5566/5565 (+16.4% on iter 7, +33.8% on baseline)

functionalize_collectives_and_compile_fx: swapped 133 in-place collectives (68 all_reduce_ + 65 all_gather_into_tensor_out) to functional + wait_tensor; compile_fx_inner blocked by device_mesh._get_submesh non-ATen op (DTensor); compile_fx re-introduces in-place via reinplace; swap alone costs -1.5% from extra waits

profile-driven analysis (iter 10, info only): GEMM 52.8%, FlashAttn 23.1%, NCCL 22.6%, FillFunctor 5.9%, _to_copy 4.6%; suggests bf16 RS (blocked-by-numerics), FillFunctor coalesce, regional compile, async loss/.item()

collapse_dtype_roundtrips: identified 358 _to_copy(bf16->fp32) upcasts; 290 feed cat.default (different-dtype operands), 64 feed view_as_complex (RoPE precompute); 0 collapsible (no shape-op-only roundtrips after iter 5 patterns)

disable_uninitialized_memory_fill: --debug.deterministic enables torch.utils.deterministic.fill_uninitialized_memory which makes 65 aten.empty.* zero-init before being fully overwritten by all_gather_into_tensor_out; audited safe and disabled; eliminates 4,061 FillFunctor kernels/step; tps 5875/5877 (+5.5% on iter 8, +41.2% on baseline)

expanded apply_inductor_pattern_passes attempt #2: tried fsdp.dedup_fsdp_reduce_scatter, reduced_atomic_contention, ddp_fusion.schedule_comm_wait + 8 others; all node-count no-ops; remaining inductor modules don't apply to FSDP+TP joint fwd+bwd graphs

regional_inductor_compile: 97/97 regions (size 20-39, 2996 nodes total) compiled cleanly via compile_fx_inner after draining decompositions + invalidating fast_random_decomps cache; numerics PASS; +0.24% (within noise) — regions too small (bounded by collectives every ~30 nodes), CUDA graphs already amortized launch overhead
collapse_cat_of_upcasts: post-iter-5 graph has 0 of 290 expected _to_copy->cat patterns (joint_graph_passes already collapsed them); pass found 0 collapses; reverted

cleanup_redundant_ops: 450 double_transpose removed (numerics pass) but +0.05% TPS (downstream codegen already collapses); 354 redundant_clone + 257 view_of_view both broke runtime via non-contiguous strides (Inductor preserves these for layout); only double_transpose retained, net no win

iter17 batch (joint_graph 2x, post_grad is_inference=True, more inductor config flags, dedupe_symints, post-bucket joint_graph): all attempts no-op or noise; FX-pass surface for further wins is exhausted

coalesce_independent_adds (recon-only): 225 add.Tensor nodes; all sequentially data-dependent (forward residual chain + backward grad accumulators with multi-user LHS); 0 groups of size >= 2 found; no coalescing pattern

unblock_inductor_codegen: removed sole _get_submesh node + drained 10 decomps + cleared fast_random_decomps cache; compile_fx_inner SUCCEEDED on whole graph, tps=6042 (+2.8%); BUT step-20 loss drifted 9.21808->9.11513 and grad_norm 4.5867->22.9803 — Inductor's whole-graph lowering not bitwise-equivalent on 8B model (debugmodel bitwise test passed but masked the precision drift)

residual FillFunctor recon (88 kernels, 22ms): 64 from FlashAttention internal scratch (opaque), 2 from CE backward zeros_like->index_put_ (semantically required), rest negligible — structural, not eliminable from passes.py

compile_fx_inner with conservative configs (17 inductor flags off: split_reductions, epilogue_fusion, coordinate_descent_tuning, shape_padding, pattern_matcher, aggressive_fusion, allow_buffer_reuse, max_autotune*, etc.): codegen succeeds but step-20 loss drifts 9.21808->8.78991 and grad_norm 4.5867->8.1171; bitwise constraint structurally incompatible with Inductor codegen on 8B graph (confirmed across 2 attempts)

remove bucket_all_gather + bucket_reduce_scatter from apply_inductor_pattern_passes: ablation revealed they become counterproductive after iter 8 CUDA graphs (the +810/+615 cat/slice/reshape nodes cost more than the launch-count reduction saves once launches are already amortized); schedule_overlap_bucketing alone suffices; tps 6052/6041/6051 (+2.9% on iter 12, +45.4% on baseline)

re-ablation after iter 22: drop remove_detach_nodes (-16 within noise, kept), drop schedule_overlap_bucketing (-543, KEEP), 2nd joint_graph_passes (no-op), move disable_uninitialized_memory_fill before inductor (-305 — empty.* nodes don't exist yet, audit no-ops); iter 22 is tight local optimum

iter24 re-profile (post-iter-22): GEMM 32.5%, FlashAttn 25.0%, RS 17.3% (f32 195ms+bf16 64ms), AG 6.1%, elementwise 4.5%, optimizer 2.7%, CatArrayBatched 1.4% (down from 2.9%), FillFunctor 1.27% raw + 74 hidden in elementwise template

replace_overwritten_zeros_with_empty: 0 of 11 candidates (9 aten.full scalars + 1 zeros_like + 1 ones_like) substitutable — all feed index_put_ partial overwrite or where.self read; remaining FillFunctor invocations are semantically required

tune aten_distributed_optimizations for schedule_overlap_bucketing: set max_memory_increase_gb=20, max_in_flight_gb=10, max_compute_pre_fetch=200, compute_estimator=benchmark; all 4 knobs set OK but tps=6038/6040 (-0.15% vs 6048) — scheduler not memory-constrained (peak mem unchanged at 49.24); compute_estimator already defaults to benchmark; overlap surface saturated

replace_random_passes + fuse_seed_creation + fuse_offset_creation: all 3 ran cleanly but 0 node delta (no rand/dropout/bernoulli in Llama3 training graph). Recon dump of post-iter-22 graph: 9,893 call_function nodes; 649 _to_copy (420 bf16->fp32, 228 fp32->bf16); 226 cat (130 bf16, 96 fp32); 229 AG (down from 421 baseline) + 293 RS (down from 421) + 68 AR — joint_graph/overlap passes consolidated collectives more than expected

dedupe_to_copy: grouped 649 _to_copy nodes by (input_node, target_dtype/layout/device/memory_format); 0 dedup groups with >1 member. joint_graph_passes CSE already catches every duplicate. All 649 remaining _to_copy have distinct inputs (genuine dtype conversions); ~74ms / 4.6% step time is from genuine conversions, not redundancy

sink_waits (custom FX pass): moved 325/622 waits to immediately before their earliest user, max move 4430 positions. tps=6,049 ≡ 6,048 baseline (+0.02%, noise). Strong evidence that FX-level node order doesn't affect runtime after schedule_overlap_bucketing's actual stream/event sequence is fixed by CUDA graph capture

literature research: 2 candidate ideas — (1) SymmetricMemory async-TP via micro_pipeline_tp_pass blocked because our TP uses all_reduce not AG+RS (iter-7 already confirmed no-op); (2) NCCL env vars (NCCL_MIN_NCHANNELS etc) out of passes.py scope and likely no-op past NCCL init; dead ends: custom Triton (bitwise-blocked, external library prohibition), zero-bubble PP (no PP), bf16 collectives (bitwise-blocked), CUDA graph extensions (already capturing joint graph)

baseline variance characterization over 8 runs: 6047/6039/6035/6040/6035/6044/6041/6041 → mean 6040.25, σ=4.1, range 12. True noise band ±2σ ≈ ±8 tps, much tighter than the prior ±1.5% (±90) threshold. Reclassifies +14 tps deltas (iter-14, iter-15) as potentially real (3.5σ above new mean)

regional_inductor_compile re-attempt on iter-22 graph: 472/708 regions compiled (avg size 7.8 nodes, 3687 total nodes Triton-fused); numerics PASS; 8-run mean tps=5742 σ=5.3 → REGRESSION -298 (-4.9%) vs 6040. Inductor per-region codegen worse than unfused under CUDA graphs (re-introduces materializations that cuda graph had eliminated). iter-14's +14 on iter-12 graph was 3-run noise, not real signal

graph motif analysis (recon-only): top-10 3-tuples and top-5 4-tuples in iter-22 graph. Top motifs dominated by zero-cost metadata ops (view/t/slice — 258+194+192). Genuine compute: RoPE bf16↔fp32 round-trips at 128/step (Inductor would fuse but bitwise-blocked); clone→view→slice at 192 (real memcpy but hand-fusion hard). FX-layer fusion surface confirmed exhausted

coalesced bucket_reduce_scatter (bucket_mode=coalesced): pass succeeded, added 645 nodes (vs 1425 default mode). 8-run mean 5846 σ=7.6 → REGRESSION -194 tps (-3.2%) vs 6040. Coalesced mode still adds wrapper nodes for output routing; structural conclusion (post-CUDA-graphs, bucketing in any form is counterproductive) extends to coalesced mode

remaining aten_distributed_optimizations knobs (compute_overlap_multipler=2, max_coll_distance=400, bucket_exposed_first=True, prioritize_bucketing_during_scheduling=True, insert_overlap_deps=True): 8-run mean 6040.0 σ=3.6 → ZERO effect vs baseline. All 5 knobs either already at effective values or don't apply to this graph. Overlap scheduling surface fully explored via config
